items.headline: Sidney Crosby creative assist helps Pittsburgh Penguins avoid sweep
items.description:
PHILADELPHIA – Sidney Crosby used his feet and some ingenuity from 21 seasons of NHL experience to help the Pittsburgh Penguins stay alive in the Stanley Cup Playoffs.
Crosby scored a first period power-play goal to get the Penguins the lead and then kicked the puck to Kris Letang for

items.headline: Pittsburgh Penguins Philadelphia Flyers Game 4 recap April 25, 2026
items.description: PHILADELPHIA -- Sidney Crosby and Rickard Rakell each had a goal and an assist, and the Pittsburgh Penguins extended their season with a 4-2 win against the Philadelphia Flyers in Game 4 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Xfinity Mobile Arena on Saturday.

items.headline: Matt Boldy delivers in clutch for Wild with Game 4 OT winner
items.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. -- Matt Boldy scored overtime goals in the Stanley Cup Playoffs all throughout his childhood in Massachusetts.

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs first round schedule television results
items.description: The 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs are underway. Here is the complete schedule for the first round of the playoffs, including TV information and results:

items.headline: Carolina Hurricanes Philadelphia Flyers Pittsburgh Penguins 2026 playoff lookahead
items.description:
The Carolina Hurricanes will play the Philadelphia Flyers or the Pittsburgh Penguins in the Eastern Conference Second Round.
The Hurricanes advanced by defeating the Ottawa Senators 4-2 in Game 4 at Canadian Tire Centre on Saturday to sweep the best-of-7 series.
The Hurricanes, the No. 1 seed from the Metropolitan

items.headline: NHL start times for Stanley Cup Playoffs 1st Round games on April 27
items.description:
NEW YORK -- The National Hockey League today announced the following updates to the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs First Round schedule:
Monday, April 27
• The start time for Game 5 of the First Round series between the Philadelphia Flyers and Pittsburgh Penguins has been set for 7 p.m. ET

items.headline: Dallas Stars Minnesota Wild game 4 recap April 25 2026
items.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. -- Matt Boldy scored on a deflection with 29 seconds remaining in overtime to give the Minnesota Wild a 3-2 win against the Dallas Stars in Game 4 of the Western Conference First Round at Grand Casino Arena on Saturday.

items.headline: Flyers Christian Dvorak skate save Penguins Game 4
items.description:
Christian Dvorak may come back in his next life as a goalie.
The Philadelphia Flyers forward made a stunning stop on the goal line of what looked to be a puck ticketed for the back of the net.
During the second period of Game 2 of the Eastern Conference First

items.headline: Ottawa Senators stung by sweep in 'really tight series'
items.description:
OTTAWA -- Brady Tkachuk appeared shell-shocked.
The Ottawa Senators captain stood in the empty dressing room at Canadian Tire Centre, trying to process what happened minutes earlier, when the Carolina Hurricanes took a 4-2 victory in Game 4 on Saturday to sweep the Eastern Conference First Round series.
“It’s heartbreaking,”

items.headline: Montreal Canadiens Arber Xhekaj playing with renewed confidence in playoffs
items.description: MONTREAL -- In each of the three games since the start of the Stanley Cup Playoffs, Arber Xhekaj has yet to play more than 11 minutes: 10:59 in Game 1, 9:05 in Game 2, and 10:40 in Game 3.

items.description:

items.headline: Edmonton Oilers in familiar spot entering Game 4 against Anaheim Ducks
items.description:
ANAHEIM -- Adversity in the Stanley Cup Playoffs seems to bring the best out of the Edmonton Oilers.
That’s a good thing for Edmonton considering it is facing adversity again heading into Game 4 of the Western Conference First Round against the Anaheim Ducks here at Honda Center on Sunday

items.headline: Carolina Hurricanes Ottawa Senators Game 4 recap April 25, 2026
items.description: OTTAWA -- Logan Stankoven scored the go-ahead goal in the third period, and the Carolina Hurricanes completed a sweep of the Ottawa Senators with a 4-2 win in Game 4 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Canadian Tire Centre on Saturday.

items.headline: Jackson LaCombe helping Anaheim Ducks limit Connor McDavid in first round
items.description:
IRVINE, Calif. -- There are a number of explanations for how the Anaheim Ducks have taken a 2-1 series lead against the Edmonton Oilers heading into Game 4 of the best-of-7 Western Conference First Round at Honda Center on Sunday (9:30 p.m. ET; ESPN, SN, CBC, TVAS2, Victory+).
